title: Expression and Purification of HIS-tagged WIPI4
author: Elisabeth Holzer

steps.title: Incubate for 168:00:00 at 27 °C
steps.instruction: Incubate for 168:00:00 at 27 °C . Harvest the supernatant as the initial viral stock (V0).

steps.title: Clone the codon-optimized WIPI4 gene into...
steps.instruction: Clone the codon-optimized WIPI4 gene into a baculoviral expression vector, transformed to DH10EMBacY cells (Geneva Biotech), and verify bacmid DNA by PCR.

steps.title: Transfect 1 million Sf9 cells in...
steps.instruction: Transfect 1 million Sf9 cells in a 6-well plate with 2500 ng purified bacmid DNA mixed with FuGENE HD transfection reagent.

steps.title: Infect 40 mL of Sf9 cells (1×10⁶ cells/mL) with V0
steps.instruction: Infect 40 mL of Sf9 cells (1×10⁶ cells/mL) with V0. Monitor for cytopathic effect (CPE) and yellow fluorescence.

steps.title: Upon signs of CPE, centrifuge the...
steps.instruction: Upon signs of CPE, centrifuge the culture and collect the supernatant as amplified virus stock (V1). Store at 4 °C .

steps.title: Wash cells once with PBS, flash-freeze...
steps.instruction: Wash cells once with PBS, flash-freeze pellets in liquid nitrogen, and store at -80 °C until purification.

steps.title: Infect 1 L of Sf9 cells...
steps.instruction: Infect 1 L of Sf9 cells (1×10⁶ cells/mL) with 1 mL of V1 virus.

steps.title: Monitor viability; harvest cells when viability drops to 90–95%
steps.instruction: Monitor viability; harvest cells when viability drops to 90–95%.

steps.title: Filter the supernatant through a 0
steps.instruction: Filter the supernatant through a 0.45 µm filter.

steps.title: Thaw frozen pellets On ice and...
steps.instruction: Thaw frozen pellets On ice and resuspend in 40 mL of ice-cold lysis buffer.

steps.title: Lyse cells by sonication (4 ×...
steps.instruction: Lyse cells by sonication (4 × 30 s at 60% amplitude with cooling On ice ).

steps.title: Clarify lysates by centrifugation at 20000...
steps.instruction: Clarify lysates by centrifugation at 20000 rpm, °C, for 01:00:00 at 4 °C using a Beckman Coulter TI45 rotor.

steps.title: Pool fractions containing the protein and...
steps.instruction: Pool fractions containing the protein and concentrate using a 10 kDa cut-off Amicon Ultra filter.

steps.title: Equilibrate a 5 mL HisTrap HP...
steps.instruction: Equilibrate a 5 mL HisTrap HP column with water followed by Buffer A.

steps.title: Load the clarified lysate onto the column
steps.instruction: Load the clarified lysate onto the column.

steps.title: Wash with three column volumes of Buffer A
steps.instruction: Wash with three column volumes of Buffer A.

steps.title: Elute bound protein using a stepwise...
steps.instruction: Elute bound protein using a stepwise imidazole gradient (30, 75, 100, 150, 225, 300 mM) by increasing the proportion of Buffer B.

steps.title: Analyze elution fractions via SDS-PAGE and Coomassie staining
steps.instruction: Analyze elution fractions via SDS-PAGE and Coomassie staining.

steps.title: Pool, concentrate, aliquot, snap-freeze in liquid...
steps.instruction: Pool, concentrate, aliquot, snap-freeze in liquid nitrogen, and store at -80 °C .

steps.title: Further purify the concentrated sample by...
steps.instruction: Further purify the concentrated sample by SEC using a Superdex 200 Increase 10/300 GL column equilibrated in SEC buffer.

steps.title: Identify protein-containing fractions by SDS-PAGE
steps.instruction: Identify protein-containing fractions by SDS-PAGE.
